    testInexistentLabel()
    Ensures that the case where an attribute doesn't exist in the database is correctly handled (the element is ignored and no exception is thrown).
    void
    testLongerPrefix()
    Ensures that the whole prefix of existing elements is taken into account (no partial match).
    void
    testLongerSuffix()
    Ensures that the whole suffix of existing elements is taken into account (no partial match).
    void

    void

    Ensures that the given prefix can look like a regular expression, in which case meta-characters are ignored.

    • testGetFreeIndexLabelGuardExtended

      public void testGetFreeIndexLabelGuardExtended() throws Exception
      Ensures that abstract guards are taken into account when computing a free label for a guard in an extended concrete event. ( bug ID 2142052 fixed )
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testGetFreeIndexLabelGuardNotExtended

      public void testGetFreeIndexLabelGuardNotExtended() throws Exception
      Ensures that abstract guards are ignored when computing a free label for a guard in a non-extended concrete event.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testRegexPrefix

      public void testRegexPrefix() throws Exception
      Ensures that the given prefix can look like a regular expression, in which case meta-characters are ignored.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testLongerPrefix

      public void testLongerPrefix() throws Exception
      Ensures that the whole prefix of existing elements is taken into account (no partial match).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testLongerSuffix

      public void testLongerSuffix() throws Exception
      Ensures that the whole suffix of existing elements is taken into account (no partial match).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testInexistentLabel

      public void testInexistentLabel() throws Exception
      Ensures that the case where an attribute doesn't exist in the database is correctly handled (the element is ignored and no exception is thrown).
      Throws:
      Exception
